# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We actively support the latest release and the `main` branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities by email to **arthur@arthur2jolly.com** (replace with your actual address).

Include:
- Description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Affected versions

We will respond within 48 hours and follow coordinated disclosure (CVE if applicable).
